title: GWAS plotting in R

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: GAPIT: R package performing Genome Wide Association Studies (GWAS) GAPIT Website: https://www.maizegenetics.net/gapit GAPIT github: https://github.com/jiabowang/GAPIT

title: GWAS plotting in R
code: devtools::install_github("derekmichaelwright/gwaspr") library(gwaspr)

title: GWAS plotting in R
text: tidyverse, ggpubr, ggbeeswarm, ggrepel, ggtext, plotly, htmlwidgets

code: dropNAcol(x)

title: gg_GWAS_Hits — gg_GWAS_Hits
text: Creates summary GWAS plot significant associations.

title: gg_GWAS_Hits — gg_GWAS_Hits
code: gg_GWAS_Hits(   xx,   xG,   xCV = NULL,   traits,   range = 2e+06,   title = "",   sigMin = 0,   models = c("BLINK", "FarmCPU", "MLMM", "MLM", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   model.shapes = c(21:25, 21:22),   vlines = NULL,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1, length(vlines)),   legend.rows = 1,   facet = F,   caption = T )

title: gg_GWAS_Hits — gg_GWAS_Hits
text: xx Table significant GWAS results. See ?table_GWAS_Results(). xG Genotype data hapmap format. xCV Optional, filtering "CV" column. traits List traits use. range Range binning GWAS hits. title Title horizontal facet. sigMin Minimum number hits plot. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. vlines Markers labelled vertical red line. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. legend.rows Number rows legend. facet Logical. facet GWAS model. caption Logical. caption added.

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: Creates summary GWAS plot significant associations. Note: function requires GWAS results files ordered

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
code: gg_GWAS_Summary(   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   traits = list_Traits(folder),   groups = NULL,   threshold = round(-log10(5e-08), 1),   sug.threshold = round(-log10(5e-06), 1),   chroms = NULL,   pos1 = NULL,   pos2 = NULL,   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "BLINK", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   shapes = 21:25,   hlines = NULL,   vlines = NULL,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1, length(vlines)),   vline.legend = T,   threshold.legend = T,   title = "Summary of Significant GWAS Results",   caption = NULL,   rowread = 2000,   legend.position = "bottom",   legend.rows = 1,   plotHBPvalues = F,   skyline = "Kansas" )

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. traits traits read. groups Grouping traits. equal length `traits`. threshold Significant threshold. sug.threshold Suggestive threshold. chroms Chromosomes plot. pos1 starting position plot. pos2 ending position plot. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. shapes shape values use different models. e.g., 21:25. hlines Locations horizontal lines. e.g., hlines = c(1.5,2.5). vlines Markers labelled vertical red line. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. vline.legend Logical, display vline color legend. threshold.legend Logical, display vline color legend. title title plot. caption caption plot. rowread Number rows read GWAS results file. legend.rows Number rows legend. plotHBPvalues Logical, H.B.P.Values uses. skyline skyline type use. Can "NYC" "Kansas". left NULL, use highest P.value.

title: gg_LDHeatmap — gg_LDheatmap
code: gg_LDheatmap(   xg = myG,   chr = 6,   pos1 = 0,   pos2 = 6e+06,   myMs = NULL,   myTitle = NULL,   axisTextSize = NULL,   nameTrim = NULL )

title: gg_LDHeatmap — gg_LDheatmap
text: chr Chromosome plot. pos1 Start position within selected chromosome. pos2 End position within selected chromosome. myMs Markers highlight within plot. myTitle Title plot. axisTextSize Text size axis labels (genotype names). nameTrim String used trim marker names. xG GWAS genotype object. Note: needs hapmap format.

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
code: gg_Manhattan(   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   trait = list_Traits(folder)[1],   title = trait,   threshold = NULL,   sug.threshold = NULL,   chrom = NULL,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   vlines = markers,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1:6, length(vlines)),   legend = T,   legend.rows = 1,   point.sizes = c(0.3, 1.25, 0.75),   facet = F,   addQQ = T,   pmax = NULL,   pmin = 0,   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "BLINK", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   highlight.sig = F,   sig.color = "darkred",   chrom.colors = rep(c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3"), 30),   chrom.unit = "100 Mbp",   plotHBPvalues = F,   skyline = "Kansas" )

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. threshold Significant Threshold. sug.threshold Suggested threshold. chrom Chromosomes plot. Use want plot single chromosome. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. vlines Markers used location vertical lines. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. legend Logical, whether add legend. legend.rows Number rows legend. point.sizes Sizes points. c("Sig", "Sig", "Sug"). facet Logical, whether produce facetted multi-model plot. Default `facet = F`. addQQ Logical, whether add QQ plot. pmax max value y-axis. Markers higher values lowered pmax.. pmin min Value plotting. Markers lower values removed. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. Used `facet = F`. highlight.sig Logical, whether highlight significant associations black circle. Used `facet = F`. sig.color Color significant assoctiations. Used `facet = T`. chrom.colors Colors chromosome. Used `facet = T`. chrom.unit Unit x-axis. Can one c("kbp","100 kbp","Mbp","100 Mbp","Gbp"). plotHBPvalues Logical, TRUE, H.B.P.values uses. skyline skyline type use. Can "NYC" "Kansas". NULL, use highest P.value.

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
code: gg_Manhattan_Zoom(   folder = "GWAS_Results/",   trait = list_Traits(folder)[1],   title = trait,   chrom,   pos1,   pos2,   threshold = NULL,   sug.threshold = NULL,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   vlines = markers,   vline.colors = rep("red", length(vlines)),   vline.types = rep(1, length(vlines)),   vline.legend = T,   pmax = NULL,   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "BLINK", "GLM", "CMLM", "SUPER"),   model.colors = gwaspr_Colors,   facet = F,   highlight.sig = F,   sig.color = "black",   legend.rows = 1,   plotHBPvalues = F,   skyline = "Kansas" )

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. chrom Chromosome plot. pos1 Start position chromosome. pos2 End position chromosome. threshold Significant Threshold. sug.threshold Suggested threshold. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. vlines Markers used location vertical lines. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.types lty vertical line. vline.legend Logical, whether add legend vlines. pmax max value y-axis. models Models read. model.colors Colors model. Used `facet = F`. facet Logical, whether produce facetted multi-model plot. Default `facet = F`. highlight.sig Logical, whether highlight significant associations black circle. Used `facet = F`. sig.color Color significant assoctiations. legend.rows Number rows legend. plotHBPvalues Logical, H.B.P.Values uses. skyline skyline type use. Can "NYC" "Kansas". left NULL, use highest P.value. addQQ Logical, whether add QQ plot chrom.colors Colors chromosome. Used `facet = T`. chrom.unit Unit x-axis. Can one c("kbp","100 kbp","Mbp","100 Mbp","Gbp").
